name: Eggplant Whatever
recipeIngredient: Frozen spinach, defrosted and wrung out
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the eggplant.
2. Salt the slices and let them sit for 30 minutes.
3. Pat the slices dry (consider rinsing to remove excess salt).
4. Place the slices in a bag with bread crumbs and shake until well coated.
5. Broil under the oven for 5-7 minutes on each side until browned.
6. In a casserole dish, add pizza sauce.
7. Arrange the eggplant slices on top of the sauce.
8. Add a thin layer of spinach (from defrosted frozen spinach).
9. Sprinkle more pizza sauce over the spinach.
10. Sprinkle bread crumbs and nutritional yeast evenly.
11. Add garlic salt and oregano.
12. Bake in the oven at 350°F or 400°F for about 20 minutes until heated through.
Note: The recipe was successfully executed with a satisfying result.
